title: Subitem column change notify someone
excerpt: Hello Monday Universe! I’m trying to send an email to someone when a subitem column changes. Works great in group but not so much for submitems. Is this not an option, any workarounds?

posts.author: KCordaro (KCORD)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Monday Universe! I’m trying to send an email to someone when a subitem column changes. Works great in group but not so much for submitems. Is this not an option, any workarounds?

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml: What kind of column are you trying to use as the trigger?

posts.author: KCordaro (KCORD)
posts.cookedHtml: Date column, so when deadline changes, send email

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml: Does the custom automation recipe for “When column changes” not work in this instance? You can select the subitem Date column and then choose the action to notify person

posts.author: KCordaro (KCORD)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s my issue is I’m only seeing subitem Status or created and not any other columns to add to recipe.

posts.author: KCordaro (KCORD)
posts.cookedHtml: this is exactly what I’ve been looking for!
